templates: {entity} exists on the surface. Down here, it exists as memory — which may be the more accurate form.
The dungeon keeps a map. {entity} is on it. Your position relative to {entity} is not what you would expect.
{entity}. The name carries climate, history, weight. The dungeon collects all three.
Someone from {entity} descended this dungeon before you. Their boots are in the lower archive. The rest of them is less locatable.
Every place has a shadow dungeon beneath it. {entity}'s is particularly deep.
You know where {entity} is. That knowledge has a gravity of its own, down here where direction loses meaning.
{entity} — a coordinate on the surface. Down here, coordinates are more complicated, and {entity} is closer than any map would suggest.
The deepest level has a room dedicated to every significant place above. {entity}'s room is larger than you'd expect.
{entity} does not know you are thinking about it. The dungeon finds this asymmetry interesting.
Borders are agreements. {entity}'s borders were agreed upon by people who never came here. The dungeon was not consulted.
The cartographer who mapped {entity} is in the archive. Their notes contradict the official version in several places the dungeon considers important.
Distance from {entity} cannot be measured accurately when you are below it. The dungeon's geometry is its own.
